query: INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, videoUrl, readingMaterial, assignment, lessonOrder) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG'), 'Close Reading Strategies', 'Learn techniques for analyzing complex texts, identifying main ideas, and understanding author intent.', 'https://example.com/video/close-reading', 'Close Reading Guide', 'Analyze academic texts', 9), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG'), 'Inference and Analysis', 'Master making inferences from text and analyzing author development of ideas.', 'https://example.com/video/inference', 'Making Inferences from Text', 'Read passages and answer questions', 10), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG'), 'Author Purpose and Tone', 'Identify author purpose and recognize tone in various texts.', 'https://example.com/video/author-purpose', 'Identifying Purpose and Tone', 'Analyze texts for purpose and tone', 11), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG'), 'Extended Response Format', 'Learn GED RLA Extended Response structure and requirements.', 'https://example.com/video/er-format', 'ER Format Guide', 'Study ER format and rubric', 12), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG'), 'Extended Response Practice', 'Practice writing ER essays with GED-style prompts.', 'https://example.com/video/er-practice', 'ER Practice Prompts', 'Write ER essay and self-evaluate', 13);
